message:
fix(codegen): Handle PyValue iteration and VM fallback in conditions

- collections.zig: Fix any()/all()/sum() to handle PyValue iteration
  - Add needsVMFallback check for genexp/lambda/uncertain calls
  - Use runtime.iterSlice() for PyValue iteration instead of .items
  - Add .isTruthy() for PyValue truthiness checks
  - Add .asInt() for PyValue sum accumulation

- conditionals.zig: Fix if condition handling for VM fallback
  - Check needsVMFallback BEFORE cond_type == .bool
  - Add .isTruthy() when condition falls back to VM eval
  - Prevents type mismatch when PyValue used as bool condition

Fixes: test_float compilation errors for any() with genexp
Fixes: if conditions with method calls on uncertain variables
